description: Author failing tests for resume reconciliation (resume-after-FF-before-journal reads the task succeeded purely from the plain FF'd commit's trailer; resume-ignores-stale-segment-ref - a trailer on a surviving segment ref that never FF'd is NOT authoritative, branch -D runs before any trailer read - W-1) and reset-retry (retry-preserves-upstream-commits: reset --hard <taskBase> keeps the upstream's committed file, taskBase ≠ preHead; -fd keeps ignored build caches with no stale-artifact false-green)
